aws-redshift-s3:position-deletes:v2.notes: Redshift reads position deletes when querying S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:position-deletes:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Redshift reads equality deletes when querying S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Merge-on-read supported when querying S3 Tables via Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Copy-on-write supported when writing to S3 Tables via Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Redshift can read evolved schemas from S3 Tables; ALTER TABLE support limited
caveats: Schema changes should be made via Spark/EMR

aws-redshift-s3:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:type-promotion:v2.notes: Type promotion limited when accessing S3 Tables via Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:column-default-values:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:table-creation:v2.notes: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE supported for S3 Tables via Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:table-creation:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:time-travel:v2.notes: Time travel supported via Redshift with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:time-travel:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:table-maintenance:v2.notes: S3 Tables provides automatic compaction; limited manual maintenance via Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Redshift does not support branching and tagging on S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:read-support:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-redshift-s3:snowflake-horizon-catalo.notes: Redshift Spectrum may be able to read Snowflake-managed Iceberg V2 tables via AWS Glue Catalog Federation, similar to Athena. This has not been confirmed. Write access is not expected to be supported.
caveats: Unconfirmed — based on Glue Catalog Federation pattern used by Athena
Write operations to external catalogs are not supported by Redshift Spectrum

aws-redshift-s3:snowflake-horizon-catalo.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 tables. This is a Redshift engine limitation.

aws-redshift-s3:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

aws-redshift-s3:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3, so V3 deletion vectors are unavailable.
